name: COA-7961 COA-7985 Daily Plan does not advance to a locked next day
description: Verifies that the current Daily Plan stage stays selected after tapping the next-day arrow; closes the locked next-day popup if the build shows it.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that the current Daily Plan stage stays selected after tapping the next-day arrow; closes the locked next-day popup if the build shows it.
